calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DIABLO REALTY, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. This matter is off calendar. A motion for change of venue was granted April 20, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue From San Francisco To Contra Costa; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Richard Colombatto, Esq., of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.457.3459, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDWARD KATS' Motion To Change Venue From San Francisco To Contra Costa is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIABLO REALTY, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is Granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Continued To Apr-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIABLO REALTY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to April 30, 2012 per agreement of the parties. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2012 Continued To Jun-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joanna Haskin, Tel. 415.218.6732, plaintiff (appearing on her own behalf) and opposing party.
Rob Saltzberg, Tel. 510.912.4226, plaintiff (appearing on his own behalf) and opposing party.
Aaron Darsky, Esq., of the Law Offices of Eric L. Lifschitz, Tel. 415.553.6055, attorney for plaintiff, and moving party.

A R G U E D. The court adopted its tentative ruling with modifications and ruled as follows: ERIC LIFTSCHITZ, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS ROBERT SALTZBERG AND JOANNA HASKIN is Granted on condition that valid service is effected on both named defendants and that proof(s) of service is filed no later than 3/09/2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
